title: Castia Inventory Tools (Season 3)
description: Small mod to make your game on Castia MC server even better
body:
A companion mod for [CastiaMC](https://castiamc.com/) players. Enhances your gameplay with inventory shortcuts, item tier highlighting, job earnings tracking, and more. Works on Forge, Fabric, and NeoForge.

>  This mod is designed exclusively for the [https://castiamc.com](https://castiamc.com/) server. Features activate automatically when you connect.

***

## **Features**

###   **Item Tier Highlighting**

  See item rarity at a glance! Colored tier icons appear on items in your hotbar, inventory, and containers — including inside InventoryHUD+ if you have it installed.

  Each tier can be individually toggled on or off.

![Relic icons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/705b4a6e13a2b08561345d6568485b736285116e.png)
![Relic icons in hotbar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e2d40e62010b9f39a34aaf8fd61a53f73ae3255.png)

***

###   **Quick Container Navigation**

  Access your most-used containers with one click. Buttons appear on the side of your inventory and container screens:

*   Inventory · Crafting Table · Ender Chest · Trash
*   Player Vaults — browse up to 6 vaults with paginated numbered buttons
*   Town Vaults — same paginated navigation for town storage

  Each button can be toggled individually. Choose whether buttons appear only on your inventory, on all container screens, or hidden entirely.

![Inventory buttons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/437ffb49d0c3aac0d39f51564325b4aff68e8179.png)
![Vault pages](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed9030281a58624c2df0b0d0412f59efac567a00.png)

***

###   **Homes GUI**

  Press `Y` to open a searchable list of all your homes. Click any home to teleport instantly. Start typing to filter — press Enter to jump to the first match. Results are cached so reopening is instant.

![Homes GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c5307ba22583322524b913cde3d5678c62de07d_0.webp)

***

###   **Job Earnings Tracker**

  Press `J` to see how much you've earned. Tracks both money and experience across multiple time windows:

  - Last hour · Last N minutes (configurable) · Session · Daily · Weekly · Monthly · Overall

  Income message display is configurable — show in chat, action bar, or hide completely.

![Money stats screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/561a16d437ed68e78787b8b4ea0adb568281461c.png)
![XP stats screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f49050eda50d2283394273055aa1e423dabffa5.png)

***

###   **Emoji Buttons**

  A compact grid of 48+ server emojis appears in the chat screen. Click to insert into your message, Shift+click to send immediately. Toggle on/off in settings.

![Emoji buttons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5641abb6386c365a8bf21dda94e0ef81ded6f2a0.png)

***

###   **Sound Controls**

  Fine-tune the volume of individual server sounds — Level Up, Quest Complete, RTP, Vein Miner, Treefeller, Gemstone, Bomb, Mithril Core, and more. Each has its own slider, plus a master volume control.

![Sound settings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14799a92cf6c197c8724bd57f327ff014639861d.png)

***

###   **Command Keybindings**

  Quick keys for common server commands:

*   `C`  - /craft
*   `R`  - /ec (ender chest)
*   `H`  - /h home
*   `B`  - /back
*   `J`  - Job Earnings sreen
*   `Y`  - Homes GUI
*   `X`  - Toggle scoreboard sidebar
*   `[`  - Open config screen
*   `Numpad 0`  - Last opened Player Vault
*   `Numpad .`  - Last opened Town Vault
*   _`(unbound)`_  - /trash, /condense

  All keybindings are fully rebindable in Minecraft's controls menu.

***

###   **InventoryHUD+ Integration**

  If you use InventoryHUD+ mod, tier icons are rendered directly on its HUD display — supporting vertical, horizontal, and mini layouts.

***

###   **Configuration**

  undefinedPress `[` to open the config screen where you can customize:

*   Which container buttons are visible
*   Tier icon visibility (per tier)
*   Emoji buttons on/off
*   Job tracking time window and message routing
*   Vault counts
*   Server sound volumes
*   Button placement mode                    

 

***

  _Made for the Castia community._
